description_long: This object is a rectangular, portable CD player with a retro design, featuring a combination of gray, green, and black colors. The top surface displays a perforated speaker grille and a central lid, likely for disc insertion, with the word 'Autostop' printed on it. The front side is equipped with a row of large, tactile control buttons, including a prominent orange button, and a green handle for carrying. The left side has visible ports and switches, including a headphone jack and other audio connectors, as well as a power button. The branding 'POTIFY' and 'DDI' are printed on the side, and a transparent section on the front reveals part of the disc tray mechanism. The overall build appears to be primarily plastic with some metal components, designed for durability and portability in urban environments.
description: A retro-style, portable CD player with a gray, green, and black color scheme, featuring large control buttons, a carrying handle, and visible audio ports.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'POTIFY' and 'DDI' branding, audio ports, power button, and part of the handle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the row of large control buttons, the orange button, and the green carrying handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the green section, the control buttons from the side, and the handle.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the perforated speaker grille and the back of the device, with no visible controls.
